chapter_title.ar: باب أَنَّ الْخَمْرَ رَأْسُ كُلِّ إِثْمٍ وَ شَرٍّ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 17 – The wine is the starting point of every sin and evil

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/260)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/260)

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from one of our companions,
(It has been narrated) raising it to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Drinking of the wine is a key to all evil’.
en.sarwar: 9. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from certain persons of our people in a marfu‘ manner has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Drinking wine is the key to all evil.’”
